name: add_football_at_position
description: Adds a football at a specific coordinate.
signature: add_football_at_position(x: float, y: float, z: float) -> dict
source_code:
async def add_football_at_position(x, y, z):
    return await add_object(name='football', x=x, y=y, z=z, shape='sphere', color='white', size=0.04)
